mainTitle: Seedance 2.0: Next-Generation AI Video Generator from ByteDance

features.title: Superior Structure Control
features.description: Seedance 2.0 delivers industry-leading structure control that outperforms Sora 2 and Veo 3. Maintain precise spatial relationships, object positioning, and scene composition throughout your entire video with unmatched accuracy.

subPoints.title: Precise Spatial Relationships
subPoints.text: Advanced algorithms maintain accurate object positioning and spatial relationships throughout video generation, ensuring consistent scene composition.

subPoints.title: Outperforms Competition
subPoints.text: Benchmark tests show Seedance 2.0 achieves superior structure preservation compared to Sora 2 and Veo 3, especially in complex multi-object scenes.

features.title: Multi-Modal Reference Input
features.description: Seedance 2.0 accepts text, images, video clips, and audio as reference inputs. Combine multiple modalities to guide your video generation with unprecedented creative control and precision.

subPoints.title: Flexible Input Options
subPoints.text: Use text prompts, reference images, video clips, or audio tracks as creative guidance - or combine them all for maximum control.

subPoints.title: Intelligent Reference Understanding
subPoints.text: Advanced AI understands the essence of your references and translates them into coherent video output while maintaining creative intent.

features.title: Perfect Character & Scene Consistency
features.description: Achieve flawless consistency across characters, scenes, and visual styles throughout your entire video. Seedance 2.0's advanced consistency engine ensures your subjects remain identical from start to finish.

subPoints.title: Character Identity Preservation
subPoints.text: Maintain exact character appearance, clothing, and features across all frames - no more identity drift or inconsistent faces.

subPoints.title: Style Coherence
subPoints.text: Visual style, lighting, and color grading remain perfectly consistent throughout the video, creating professional-quality output.

features.title: Realistic Physics Simulation
features.description: Seedance 2.0 generates videos with physically accurate motion, gravity, collisions, and material interactions. Objects move naturally with realistic weight, momentum, and environmental responses.

subPoints.title: Natural Motion Dynamics
subPoints.text: Objects exhibit realistic acceleration, deceleration, and momentum - from falling leaves to flowing water to walking characters.

subPoints.title: Material Interactions
subPoints.text: Accurate simulation of how different materials interact - fabric draping, liquid splashing, rigid body collisions, and more.

features.title: Seamless Video Extension
features.description: Extend your videos seamlessly without visible transitions or quality degradation. Seedance 2.0's extension technology maintains perfect continuity in motion, style, and narrative flow.

subPoints.title: Invisible Transitions
subPoints.text: Extended segments blend perfectly with original footage - no jarring cuts, style shifts, or temporal inconsistencies.

subPoints.title: Narrative Continuity
subPoints.text: AI understands the story context and extends videos in ways that maintain logical narrative progression and visual coherence.

features.title: Cinematic Aesthetics & Quality
features.description: Seedance 2.0 produces Hollywood-grade visual quality with professional cinematography, dynamic lighting, and film-like color grading. Every frame is crafted with cinematic excellence.

subPoints.title: Professional Cinematography
subPoints.text: Dynamic camera movements, depth of field effects, and professional framing that rivals traditional filmmaking techniques.

subPoints.title: Film-Grade Color Science
subPoints.text: Advanced color grading and lighting simulation creates the rich, nuanced visual palette expected in professional productions.
